staleness_analysis.summary: All 9 pending curmudgeon reviews had stale findings. breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Kill-Shot Tests Now Rated: 3 Decisive, 2 Major, 2 Supportive — Verify for Yourself
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The Kill Shots page now shows a colour-coded badge on every test header so readers can independently verify the aggregate 3/2/2 claim. Test 5 (Eclipse 2026) has been expanded from a single-paragraph deferral to a self-contained three-paragraph kill-shot explaining how the eclipse path itself is borrowed from globe geometry before the dome's magnetic formula even runs.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Closes a credibility gap: the aggregate ratings claim was unverifiable. Now every reader can count the badges.
